que: What does the IconButton widget create in Flutter?

Which two parameters are required for IconButton?
Which parameter controls the color of the icon in IconButton?
Which parameter controls the size of the icon inside IconButton?
Which parameter shows text when the IconButton is long-pressed?

options: For compact actions in app bars and cards

que: Why is using the tooltip parameter recommended?

What must you not forget to provide when using IconButton?

options: The button is disabled and non-interactive

que: Which statement best describes the relationship between Icon and IconButton?
options: IconButton is a type of Icon
IconButton wraps an Icon to make it clickable
Icon replaces IconButton in newer Flutter versions

que: Which of the following is a typical use case for IconButton?
options: Open a settings screen from the AppBar

que: Which property would you adjust to increase the tappable visual size of the icon itself?

options: It should only be used inside dialogs
It can be used anywhere an icon-based action is needed
It replaces all text buttons in Flutter

que: Which statement best summarizes the IconButton widget?
options: A button widget that shows an icon and triggers an onPressed callback, ideal for compact actions with optional color, size, and tooltip configuration
A full-width button with both icon and text
